data.title: Sunrise New Energy named a top 11 global supplier of artificial graphite anode materials for energy storage and EV batteries.
data.description: In ZIBO, China on September 26, 2025, Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd. revealed that it has earned recognition as one of the top eleven worldwide suppliers of artificial graphite anode materials for energy storage batteries and electric vehicle (EV) batteries. The company, trading on NASDAQ under EPOW, is known for its innovation in this field, showcasing significant progress and technology improvements. This acknowledgment emphasizes Sunrise's impressive growth trajectory and its commitment to enhancing both technology and production capabilities in the industry.

data.title: Energy Vault Holdings receives $50M for energy storage projects, forging growth and development in sustainable solutions.
data.description: Energy Vault Holdings Inc., a prominent provider of sustainable grid-scale energy storage solutions, has recently disclosed a significant financing development. The company, listed on NYSE as NRGV, has finalized an exclusive funding deal with YA II PN, Ltd., wherein they stand to receive up to $50 million through corporate debenture financing. This agreement is designed to offer enhanced financial freedom at the parent company level and aid in bolstering Energy Vault's expansion initiatives within the energy storage project domain.

data.title: Baiya International Group acquires Starfish and its decentralized protocol, UpTop.Meme, on BNB Chain, as part of its Web3 strategy.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Baiya International Group Inc. (BIYA) announced that it has signed a Share Purchase Agreement with STARFISH TECHNOLOGY-FZE and its shareholders. This Agreement entails BIYA acquiring 100% of Starfish and its flagship platform, UpTop.Meme (UpTop), a decentralized liquidity protocol on BNB Chain. UpTop offers on-chain liquidity services for crypto-native digital assets, tokenized U.S. equities, and digital bonds, aiming to be a premier decentralized liquidity infrastructure globally. This acquisition is a significant step in BIYA's Web3 strategy. BIYA is a human resources technology firm utilizing its cloud-based platform for crowdsourcing recruitment and SaaS-enabled HR services, listed on Nasdaq under BIYA.

data.title: Seuritize collaborates with Sei Network for Apollo's ACRED launch, offering tokenized credit fund for improved accessibility.
data.description: In a strategic move, Securitize has joined forces with Sei Network to introduce Apollo's ACRED in a tokenized format. This collaboration aims to improve liquidity and widen investor reach by leveraging blockchain technology. This partnership marks a significant step forward in the market, offering new opportunities for investors and driving innovation.
